{{Infobox location
| name = Fathom (The Last Horizon)
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

''See also: [[Fathom (The Last Horizon) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Last Horizon]] is an extraordinary starship characterized by its organic appearance and dark metal plating that emits a blue-green or magical glow at its seams. Measuring at least five hundred yards in length, the vessel is shaped similarly to a diving predatory bird. Unlike standard starships that show signs of wear or manufacturing limitations, the interior of this ship is flawlessly constructed. The vessel possesses immense power and advanced weaponry capable of piercing enemy engines with green energy or cutting through defenses like a blade. It functions as more than just a craft, as it has a Captain who also serves as its caster and is capable of awakening to face significant threats. The ship has been observed positioned at the edge of the [[Dornoth system]] and has engaged in combat within the [[Fathom system]], where it faced planetary defenses and various fleets.}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Fathom is a major system that the [[Swarm-Queen]] might feed on.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c34">''The Knight'', chapter 34</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The Captain plans to take the fight to Fathom.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c45">''The Knight'', chapter 45</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Fathom is a moon and the human home world that serves as the capital of the [[Galactic Union]]. Known as the Heart of the Galaxy, this ancient center of culture and economy is home to twelve sprawling megacities and maintains populations across every planet in its system. While [[Planetary Security]] operates there, the world is also a [[World Spirit]] with an avatar and projection that serves as the concentrated heart of [[Solstice]]'s power. After [[Varic]] attempted to track [[Benri]] to the planet, [[Benri]] eventually docked there, only to witness starships lifting into the air during an attack launched by the narrator's side. This conflict left [[Benri]] horrified by the events on the planet, which is defended by a Planetary Defense [[Force]].}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Fathom is the human home world.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Fathom is a location where [[Planetary Security]] operates.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Varic]] attempted to track [[Benri]] to Fathom.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c5">''The Pilot'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Captain was born on Fathom six times.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c9">''The Pilot'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Fathom is an important world with populations on every planet in its system.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The call [[Benri]] received likely originated from Fathom.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c11">''The Pilot'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Benri]] intends to return to Fathom.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Benri]] docked in Fathom.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22">''The Pilot'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Fathom's population lives in twelve sprawling megacities.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Fathom is a planet.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24">''The Pilot'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Fathom [[Subline]] is a location.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A [[Subspace warp]] blooms just outside Fathom’s atmosphere.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Fathom is a planet often called the Heart of the Galaxy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26">''The Pilot'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Fathom is considered an ancient center of culture and economy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Fathom is currently being attacked.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Fathom is a planet where starships were lifting into the air.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The narrator's side attacked Fathom.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c28">''The Pilot'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Fathom has a Planetary Defense [[Force]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Fathom has defenders.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The crew was not invading Fathom.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Something happened on Fathom that [[Benri Vallenar]] was horrified to learn about.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32">''The Pilot'', chapter 32</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Ortila]] has family on Fathom.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c32" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Solstice]]'s influence is concentrated in Fathom.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c35">''The Pilot'', chapter 35</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Gunder]] does not live on Fathom.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Fathom is a [[World Spirit]] with an avatar.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Fathom is the heart of [[Solstice]]'s power.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40">''The Pilot'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[The Oracle]]'s base is not on Fathom.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c40" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Fathom is a moon.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c41">''The Pilot'', chapter 41</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Fathom is a [[World Spirit]] that the planet's [[World Spirit]] addressed by name.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48">''The Pilot'', chapter 48</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Fathom has a projection.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c48" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Fathom is the capital of the [[Galactic Union]] and the heart of the galaxy.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c49">''The Pilot'', chapter 49</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|“As soon as we can leave, make an excuse and get us out of here. We’re returning to Fathom.”<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Nations and empires]]
